description: Open business information no restriction on sharing. Default label for product catalog and reference data with no personal element.
Internal-only business data. Default for operational metadata stewardship lists and audit logs that do not contain raw PII.
Confidential business and personal data. Default for customer master service-account and complaint records. Requires named access need.
Most restricted tier. SIN payment partials banking and other regulated identifiers. Requires explicit approval and audit logging.

assignment_rule: Classifier=PersonName OR EmailAddress OR CanadianPostalCode OR DateOfBirth OR GeoCoordinate
description: Auto-apply Confidential when any standard PII classifier fires on an asset column.

assignment_rule: Classifier=CanadianSIN OR ENERCARE.CUSTOM.SIN OR CreditCardNumber OR BankRoutingNumber
description: Auto-apply Highly Confidential when any regulated-identifier classifier fires (built-in OR Enercare custom SIN backstop).
Mandatory label on the Customer 360 data product semantic model regardless of classifier output.
Mandatory label on the Billing and Contract Health data product because contracts contain financial CDEs.
Default label for any Fabric item that no other rule matches.
